report.executive_summary: The report has generic startup interest and one WTP-like quote, but the buyer segment is vague and not reachable enough for ready status.

evidence.title: Founders want better metrics
evidence.summary: Broad pain: founders and businesses want better startup metrics dashboards.
evidence.quote: Metrics are everywhere and dashboards are messy.

wtp_evidence.title: Would pay for better dashboards
wtp_evidence.summary: Weak WTP: a founder says they might pay for a better dashboard but gives no segment, budget owner, or trigger.
wtp_evidence.quote: I might pay if it was better than what we have.

competitor_complaints.title: Analytics dashboards are generic
competitor_complaints.summary: Competitor complaint is broad and not tied to a specific ICP or buying trigger.

direct_competitors.name: GenericAnalytics
direct_competitors.gap: Broad dashboard complaint without a segment-specific wedge.
